daily.today_energy: Your vibe is crystalline clarity mixed with that delicious restlessness that makes you dangerous in the best way. Channel this into something creative—the universe is basically handing you a permission slip to be weird.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift. Whether you're attached or flying solo, there's magnetic potential brewing. Don't overthink the signals; just be authentically you and watch what gravitates closer.
daily.career: Your innovative thinking is *chef's kiss* right now. That idea you've been sitting on? Today's the day to float it. Your confidence is contagious, and people are ready to listen.
daily.health: Your mind feels sharper than usual—lean into it. Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. A walk, dance, or stretch session will ground all that mental electricity you're carrying.

weekly.overview: This week's energy invites you to embrace your quirky authenticity. Mercury's vibes are pushing you toward honest conversations that feel overdue. Trust the timing—your people are ready to hear what you've been holding back.
weekly.love: Singles: someone's been noticing your vibe from afar. Coupled up? This is a solid week to get vulnerable without the usual walls. The universe is creating space for real connection, not surface-level stuff.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. If you've been sitting on a project proposal or new approach, this week's energy supports putting it out there. Collaboration brings unexpected momentum.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching—prioritize what makes you feel alive rather than what you think you *should* do.
